testcase.name: test_rpg_bosses

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'bosses' in [{'accessible': True, 'active_encounter': {'boss_id': 'shadow_of_doubt', 'boss_name': 'Shadow of Doubt', 'created_at': '2026-03-31T20:42:35.984468+00:00', 'current_hp': 4887, ...}, 'color': '#6B7280', 'description': 'A dark entity that feeds on uncertainty — only unified focus can dispel it', ...}, {'accessible': True, 'active_encounter': None, 'color': '#EF4444', 'description': 'A tempest of chaotic energy — only deep breathing and harmony can calm it', ...}, {'accessible': False, 'active_encounter': None, 'color': '#1F2937', 'description': 'An ancient cosmic entity from the space between dimensions — requires unprecedented unity', ...}]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_latency_encounters.py:137: in test_rpg_bosses assert "bosses" in data E AssertionError: assert 'bosses' in [{'accessible': True, 'active_encounter': {'boss_id': 'shadow_of_doubt', 'boss_name': 'Shadow of Doubt', 'created_at': '2026-03-31T20:42:35.984468+00:00', 'current_hp': 4887, ...}, 'color': '#6B7280', 'description': 'A dark entity that feeds on uncertainty — only unified focus can dispel it', ...}, {'accessible': True, 'active_encounter': None, 'color': '#EF4444', 'description': 'A tempest of chaotic energy — only deep breathing and harmony can calm it', ...}, {'accessible': False, 'active_encounter': None, 'color': '#1F2937', 'description': 'An ancient cosmic entity from the space between dimensions — requires unprecedented unity', ...}]
